metadata.note: GPIO numbers without prefix are BCM2727 (OMAP3630 imaging processor). RAPUYAMA genio numbers are CMT modem GPIO namespace.

signals.name: VDD_BAT
signals.notes: Battery supply to BCM2727 VDD_BAT (4 pins)

signals.name: VDD_1V8
signals.notes: Digital IO supply to BCM2727 VDD_1V8 (8 pins), via L1401/L1402/L1403/L1404 ferrites

signals.name: VDD_CORE
signals.notes: Core logic supply, 17 pins on BCM2727

signals.name: PRI_CAM_SDA
signals.notes: Primary camera I2C data. BCM2727 GPIO28 in schematics block diagram text.

signals.name: PRI_CAM_SCL
signals.notes: Primary camera I2C clock. BCM2727 GPIO29 in schematics block diagram text.

signals.name: EXTCLK
signals.notes: Primary camera master clock. BCM2727 GPIO38 in block diagram.

signals.name: VCAM_1V8
signals.notes: 1.8V camera supply, N1515 boost LDO, VIN=VBAT

signals.name: VCAM_2V8
signals.notes: 2.8V camera analog supply, N1517 LDO, VIN=VBAT

signals.name: GPIO40
signals.notes: BCM2727 GPIO to J1443 connector (function TBD)

signals.name: GPIO43
signals.notes: BCM2727 GPIO to J1445 connector (function TBD)

signals.name: GPIO47
signals.notes: Secondary camera I2C SDA (bus 1) via 3k3 to UI flex page 9

signals.name: GPIO46
signals.notes: Secondary camera I2C SCL (bus 0) via 3k3 to UI flex page 9

signals.name: CCP_CLKP
signals.notes: Secondary camera CCP clock positive to UI flex

signals.name: CCP_CLKN
signals.notes: Secondary camera CCP clock negative to UI flex

signals.name: CCP_DP
signals.notes: Secondary camera CCP data positive to UI flex

signals.name: GPIO33
signals.notes: Display tearing effect signal TE0 to UI flex (page 9)

signals.name: GPIO37
signals.notes: Display reset DISP_RESET_N to UI flex (page 9)

signals.name: DSI1_CLKP
signals.notes: MIPI DSI clock+ to UI flex (page 9)

signals.name: DSI1_CLKN
signals.notes: MIPI DSI clock- to UI flex (page 9)

signals.name: FLASH_TRIGGER
signals.notes: Camera flash strobe trigger. BCM2727 GPIO49.

signals.name: SENNA_TORCH_ENABLE
signals.notes: Torch mode control from RAPUYAMA CMT modem

signals.name: CCP_BUS_30_0
signals.notes: 30-bit CCP imaging data bus BCM2727 to RAPUYAMA

signals.name: 19P2_MHz_CRYSTAL
signals.notes: 19.2 MHz main clock via L1515/L1400 filtering

signals.name: GPS_15_0
signals.notes: GPS data bus RAPUYAMA to WL1273 BOB

signals.name: WLAN_15_0
signals.notes: WLAN SPI+control bus RAPUYAMA to WL1273

signals.name: AudioClk_IN
signals.notes: Audio clock input to PEARL, shared pin P23 with USB_PSE_ChargeINT

signals.name: RFCTRL_11_0
signals.notes: RF control bus RAPUYAMA to AURA

signals.name: RFCLK_1_0
signals.notes: RF clock differential pair to AURA

signals.name: DIG_AUDIO_20_0
signals.notes: Digital audio bus RAPUYAMA to PEARL

signals.name: EMINT_3_0
signals.notes: PEARL power management interrupt to RAPUYAMA

signals.name: HDMI_HPD
signals.notes: HDMI hot plug detect from MESSI-16 controller

signals.name: DISPCDataLCD_14_0
signals.notes: Display data bus from RAPUYAMA ASIP to BCM2727

signals.name: TxCClk
signals.notes: TX clock from RAPUYAMA to PEARL audio and RF

signals.name: MMCDa_0_3
signals.notes: MMC1 data bus to combo memory (256MB LPDDR+1024MB NAND)

signals.name: I2C0SDA
signals.notes: I2C bus 0 data (shared across QWERTY flex and UI flex)

signals.name: AVVideoCTRL
signals.notes: AV analog video switch control. RAPUYAMA J3226/genio3.

signals.name: VCORE
signals.notes: RAPUYAMA core supply from PEARL SMPS, via C2230/C2231

signals.name: VIO
signals.notes: Main 1.8V digital IO supply from PEARL SMPS

signals.name: VOUT
signals.notes: PEARL LDO 2.5V for BCM2727 DAC and IO banks

signals.name: VAUX2
signals.notes: PEARL LDO for accelerometer and combo memory reference

signals.name: VAUX1
signals.notes: PEARL LDO for cameras, QWERTY LEDs, sensors

signals.name: VBUS
signals.notes: USB 5V bus power when cable connected

signals.name: VBack
signals.notes: RTC backup supply (not assembled on all units)

signals.name: IHFP
signals.notes: IHF speaker output positive, via L2403 ferrite

signals.name: IHFN
signals.notes: IHF speaker output negative, via L2404 ferrite

signals.name: SimDetX
signals.notes: SIM card present detect (active low), R2700 100k pull

signals.name: FMANT
signals.notes: FM radio antenna (uses headset cable as antenna)

signals.name: AudioClk0
signals.notes: Audio clock 0 from PEARL to RAPUYAMA

signals.name: BT_WAKEUP
signals.notes: Bluetooth wake-up from BOB to RAPUYAMA

signals.name: I2C_SCL_U1TX
signals.notes: GPS I2C clock (or UART TX in UART mode)

signals.name: I2C_SDA_U1RX
signals.notes: GPS I2C data (or UART RX in UART mode)

signals.name: RF_PORT_BT_WLAN
signals.notes: BT/WLAN RF output to 2.4 GHz bandpass filter

signals.name: GPS_LNA_IN
signals.notes: GPS antenna input via 1575.42 MHz SAW filter

signals.name: DSI1_CLKP_UI
signals.notes: MIPI DSI clock+ routed through UI flex connector

signals.name: DSI1_CLKN_UI
signals.notes: MIPI DSI clock- routed through UI flex connector

signals.name: TE0
signals.notes: Display tearing effect, command mode sync

signals.name: CLK_32K_LED
signals.notes: 32 kHz reference for LED driver charge pump

signals.name: HOME_KEY
signals.notes: Home button to RAPUYAMA keyboard bus

signals.name: ADDR_SEL0_ALS
signals.notes: ALS I2C address select strap (0R to GND)

signals.name: RFSTROBE
signals.notes: RF strobe from AURA to RAPUYAMA

signals.name: OUTCP_TX
signals.notes: TX output coupling point from AURA to PAs

signals.name: RFoutHB
signals.notes: High-band PA RF output to SAW filter

signals.name: RFoutLB
signals.notes: Low-band PA RF output to antenna

signals.name: XINP
signals.notes: 38.4 MHz TCXO reference clock+ to AURA

signals.name: XINM
signals.notes: 38.4 MHz TCXO reference clock- to AURA

signals.name: PA_DAC
signals.notes: PA bias DAC output from AURA

signals.name: LBAnt
signals.notes: Low-band antenna path to spring contact

signals.name: HBAnt
signals.notes: High-band antenna path to spring contact

signals.name: RFClkExt_5_0
signals.notes: RF external clock from AURA to WL1273
